desc: Creates a ParameterFilterElement (view filter) in the active document.
summary: Creates a ParameterFilterElement (view filter) in the active document. Supports two modes: category-only filter or parameter-based filter with a string rule. Uses CreateFilters.CreateParameterFilter for parameter rules and CreateFilters.CreateCategoryFilter for category-only filters. After creation, use ApplyFilterToViewCommand to apply to a view.
usecase: User wants to create a view filter to isolate specific MEP categories. User needs a parameter-based filter (e.g. "System Type contains Domestic"). AI needs to set up view filters as part of automated view setup.
notfor: Applying filters to views (use ApplyFilterToViewCommand). Deleting or modifying existing filters. Creating sheet filters or schedule filters.
precondition: Active document must be open. At least one valid BuiltInCategory must be provided. For parameter filters, the BuiltInParameter must exist on the target categories.
postcondition: A new ParameterFilterElement is created in the document. Result JSON stored in LastQueryResult with success flag, filterId, filterName.

config_inputs.name: parameter
config_inputs.description: Optional BuiltInParameter name for string rule

config_inputs.name: value
config_inputs.description: Optional string value for parameter rule

outputs.name: Result
outputs.description: Filter creation result with success, filterId, filterName

successprompts: Done — view filter "{filterName}" is ready to apply.
